title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat or embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, markdown, code highlight, RAG).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, asynchronous and reactive APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API; generate, chat, embed, pull models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI wrapper around Ollama with prompts library and batch jobs.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for code completion.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in replacement for OpenAI Codex using Ollama; serves OpenAI-compatible completions endpoint.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama chat responses into any channel using slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds and development shells across macOS/Linux.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio/hyper.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers and tests in CI pipelines without local GPU.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (Windows/Linux/macOS) with chat interface.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda Connectors that invoke Ollama models inside BPMN processes for AI tasks.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for note summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using Ollama models with thread support and rate limiting.
